'''√p-h-p''' ('''pahapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deanonymise|deanonymise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deanonymise|deanonymise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √p-h-p
|-
! Lemma
| pahapa
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || pahapithi || pahapiji || pahapishi || pahapi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || pahaputhuth || pahapujuj || pahapushush || pahap
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || pahaputhu || pahapuju || pahapushu || pahapu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || pahapufuth || pahapufuj || pahapufush || pahapuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || pahapethe || pahapeje || pahapeshe || pahape
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || pahapothoth || pahapojoj || pahaposhosh || pahap
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || pahapotho || pahapojo || pahaposho || pahapo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || pahapofoth || pahapofoj || pahapofosh || pahapof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pahapïf || pahapïf || pahapïf || pahapïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || pahapïfïf || pahapïfïf || pahapïfïf || pahapïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || pahapïf || pahapïf || pahapïf || pahapïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || pahapïf || pahapïf || pahapïf || pahapïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || pahapæthæ || pahapæjæ || pahapæshæ || pahapæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || pahapathath || pahapajaj || pahapashash || pahap
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || pahapatha || pahapaja || pahapasha || pahapa
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || pahapafath || pahapafaj || pahapafash || pahapaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || pahapasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gopahapasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokipahapasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || pahapnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gopahapnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokipahapnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || pahapshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gopahapnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokipahapshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || pahaproasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gopahapnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokipahaproasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || pahapmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gopahapnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokipahapmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || pahapsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gopahapnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokipahapsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || pahapngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gopahapnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokipahapngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || pahapyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gopahapnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokipahapyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || pahapyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gopahapnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokipahapyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || pahapnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gopahapnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokipahapnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || pahapnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gopahapnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokipahapnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || pahapnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gopahapnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokipahapnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || pahapshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gopahapnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokipahapshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || pahapshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gopahapnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokipahapshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || pahapshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gopahapnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokipahapshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || pahapronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gopahapnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokipahapronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || pahaproshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gopahapnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokipahaproshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || pahapromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gopahapnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokipahapromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || pahapmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gopahapnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokipahapmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || pahapmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gopahapnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokipahapmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || pahapmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gopahapnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokipahapmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || pahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || pæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hopahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hopæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohopahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohopæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüpahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüpæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüpahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüpæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïpahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïpæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïpahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïpæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lupahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lupæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lulupahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lulupæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lipahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lipæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilipahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilipæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kopahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kopæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokopahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokopæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kepahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kepæhæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekepahap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekepæhæp
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
